title: Global market fall due to the collapse of technology stocks and artificial intelligence
summary: Global stock markets register significant losses led by the technology sector, with the Nasdaq falling nearly 2%, dragged by concerns about AI valuations, chips, and geopolitical tensions in the Middle East.

title: Escalation in Iran and tensions in the Strait of Hormuz fuel energy uncertainty
summary: The conflict in the Middle East hits gold, silver and cryptocurrency prices, while Chevron and the U.S. seek alternative routes to the Strait of Hormuz and the energy sector leads gains in the markets.

title: Netflix disappoints the market with its forecasts and its shares plummet on Wall Street
summary: Although the company met revenue expectations, its weak forecast for the next quarter caused a sharp stock market decline and fueled general pessimism in the streaming sector.

title: The future of artificial intelligence: massive investment in infrastructure and doubts about valuations
summary: While ASML and Applied Digital advance in key AI capacity, analysts like Bernstein foresee an increase in cloud spending, although questions persist about whether the technology will replace traditional enterprise software.

title: SpaceX shares fall below the IPO price after the abort of the Starship flight
summary: The setback in the Starship rocket test and the general pressure on the IPO market sink the value of the space company, which loses a trillion dollars in market capitalization.

title: Digi rides a rollercoaster in its volatile stock market debut on the Spanish Stock Exchange
summary: Telecommunications operator Digi Communications experienced a session of high volatility in its debut on the continuous market, with sharp initial gains that turned into falls of up to 8%.

title: Trump Media plans to sell ultra-fast access to the president's posts on Truth Social
summary: Truth Social's proposal to offer a high-speed data feed on Donald Trump's posts generates criticism and doubts about its legality and its impact on financial markets.

title: Mixed inflation, public debt and import figures set the agenda for central banks
summary: Inflation in the euro zone moderates slightly while import prices in the U.S. rise unexpectedly and the Bank of England faces pressure to slow its long-term bond sales.

title: The Ibex 35 gives ground dragged by the global tech sell-off and tension in the Middle East
summary: The Spanish benchmark closes the session lower, with BBVA, ArcelorMittal and ACS as the worst performers, while Endesa, Redeia and Telefónica try to contain losses for the day.

title: Uber agrees to buy Delivery Hero for $14.8 billion in a historic deal
summary: The acquisition could redefine the global food delivery market, consolidating Uber's position and signaling the possible end of the price war in the sector.

title: German government backs down from blocking the takeover bid for Commerzbank
summary: The federal administration modifies its stance on the possible acquisition of the German bank, paving the way for further consolidation in the country's financial sector.

title: Warren Buffett announces he will sell all his Berkshire Hathaway shares by 2034
summary: The legendary investor reveals his plan to gradually liquidate his stake in the conglomerate to donate his entire fortune to various charitable foundations.

title: PayPal management considers the received acquisition offer insufficient
summary: Executives of the payments platform evaluate the purchase proposal but consider it below the company's real value, waiting for possible new offers.

title: Dassault Systèmes negotiates purchase of a clinical trial software company for 2 billion
summary: The French industrial software firm is in advanced talks to acquire a technology platform that optimizes pharmaceutical trials and medical research.

title: Crypto.com reaches a valuation of $20 billion after investment from Citadel Securities
summary: The cryptocurrency exchange receives a significant capital injection from the trading giant, which boosts its market valuation and strengthens its position in the crypto industry.

title: High expectations for Tesla's quarterly results scheduled for July 22
summary: Investors await the figures from Elon Musk's company amid volatility in the technology sector and growing doubts about global demand for electric vehicles.

title: India intensifies its economic strategy with uranium exploration and a $1 billion IPO
summary: The Modi government accelerates the exploration of critical minerals for the energy transition, while SBI Funds Management prepares to go public in a key move for Indian markets.

title: A Trump teleprompter operator under scrutiny for betting on prediction markets
summary: The activity of the campaign employee on political betting platforms attracts regulatory scrutiny, in a context of growing tension in the US political environment.

title: Sweetgreen recovers on the stock market while Taco Bell suffers the consequences of the vegetable panic
summary: The salad chain benefits from the fresh produce supply crisis affecting its competitor, reversing initial losses and closing the session in positive territory.

title: Botswana reveals that Anglo American has already selected a buyer for the historic De Beers
summary: The Botswana government announces that mining giant Anglo American has chosen a preferred bidder for the acquisition of the diamond company, evaluating the optimal structure of the transaction.
